text.title: Prompt Patterns for Common Dev Tasks Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Prompt begins 'hey can you fix the thing where…' — no pattern, no slots.
antipattern.fix: Reject the prompt; rewrite with the pattern header and the four slots.

antipattern.symptom: Inputs slot is 'something in the payments module probably'.
antipattern.root-cause: Developer skipped grep and dumped vague pointers.
antipattern.fix: Replace with concrete file paths produced by a grep or git log query.

antipattern.symptom: Prompt has Intent + Inputs + Format but no binary success_criterion.
antipattern.fix: Add a single binary check the agent (and human) can verify.
